pageContext.name: Naruto Uzumaki (Sage Mode)
pageContext.description: Sideshow and MegaHouse present the new Naruto Uzumaki (Sage Mode) Collectible Figure!  Standing at 7.48' tall, Naruto is seen with his mischievous smile and wearing his Sage Mode outfit that allows him to enter an empowered state and tap into the natural forces of the world.   Don't miss your chance to add this Naruto Figure to your anime figure collection today!
